action.reasoning: Observation: The 8-layer GIN model with 500 hidden dimensions achieved an AP of 0.2650 after 50 epochs. The iteration took ~70 minutes. Analysis: The model is still improving and we have 2.74 hours left. To push the performance further, I will increase the model capacity to 600 hidden dimensions and train for 65 epochs (which should take ~1.8 hours, well within the budget). I will also add the final virtual node embedding to the pooled graph representation before the final prediction layer, which is a common technique to improve global graph representation. Decision: Update model.py, train.py, and predict.py with the new architecture and training schedule, and train for 65 epochs.
